title: abeec 44-Piece Glitter Pencil Case – Girls' Stationery Set with Felt Tip Pens, Colouring Pencils, Gel Pens – Back-to-School Supplies – Ideal Gifts for Girls
features: Comprehensive 44-Piece Stationery Set: This glitter pencil case is packed with 44 essential stationery items, including felt tip pens, colouring pencils, gel pens, highlighters, and HB pencils. Ideal for kids and teenagers, this is the ultimate stationery set for girls who love arts, crafts, and creative schoolwork.

Stylish & Practical Pencil Case: The girls' pencil case features a secure zip closure and a vibrant pink glitter finish, making it both functional and fashionable. The durable design ensures that all back-to-school supplies stay neatly organised, perfect for school, home, or travel.

Back-to-School Essential: Whether for homework, art projects, or note-taking, this stationery set for girls includes everything needed to stay creative and organised. The filled pencil case is ideal for use in class, at home, or on the go.

Perfect Gift for Girls & Teens: Packaged in a beautifully designed box with bright colours, hearts, and glitter, this stationery gift set is a fantastic choice for birthdays, Christmas, and back-to-school season. A great gift for girls and boys who love stationery and creativity.

Complete Writing & Drawing Kit: Includes 18 felt tips, 10 colouring pencils, 6 gel pens, 2 HB pencils, 2 highlighters, ruler, sharpener, eraser, sticky notes, and a 6-in-1 pen – a complete stationery set for kids that sparks creativity and learning.
description: Product Description abeec 44 Piece Glitter Pencil case The glitter stationery set and pencil case is the perfect gift for girls, adults or teachers. Use as the ideal school stationery set with everything you need to fill your back to school pencil case from a stylus pen and felt tips to a note book. The set comes in a well designed box guaranteed to put a smile on any child's face. Makes a fantastic Christmas gift for girls, Easter gift for girls or Birthday gift for girls. What's Included? 1 x 15 cm Ruler 1 x Sticky Notepad 1 x Sharpener 1 x Eraser 1 x Rainbow Pen 2 x Highlighters 2 x Pencils 6 x Gel Pens 10 x Colouring Pencils 18 x Felt Tip Pens Zip Lock Design The good quality zip lock function is ideal for keeping all your child's stationery supplies safe and secure. The case has elastic loops which pencils, pens and other essential supplies can be slotted neatly into. The glitter pencil case has everything you need, all in one place. This easy to use stationery set is perfect for a child's first back to school pencil case.
